UPS Package Delivery Options.title: Introduction
content: Select a nearby UPS Access Point™ to pick up your package at your convenience — available at local businesses, UPS Stores, and lockers. Access Points are open early, late, and on weekends so you never miss a delivery.

UPS Package Delivery Options.title: Step 2: Instructions
UPS Package Delivery Options.content: This is step 2. Follow the instructions carefully to proceed to the next step.

UPS Package Delivery Options.title: Choose an Access Point
UPS Package Delivery Options.content: Select a nearby UPS Access Point™ to pick up your package at your convenience — available at local businesses, UPS Stores, and lockers. Access Points are open early, late, and on weekends so you never miss a delivery.

UPS Package Delivery Options.title: Step 4: Review Information
UPS Package Delivery Options.content: This is step 4. Review all the information provided before proceeding.

UPS Package Delivery Options.title: Step 5: Final Confirmation
UPS Package Delivery Options.content: This is the final step. Please confirm your information before submitting.

Tooltip Example.title: Tooltip Example
Tooltip Example.content: This is a tooltip example. It provides additional information about the button.
